entry.title: Entry #9 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: District Judge Angel Kelley: ELECTRONIC ORDER entered GRANTING 8 STIPULATION re 1 Complaint (To Extend Time to March 30, 2026 to Respond).Any future request for extensions of time must be filed by motion. (EZG) (Entered: 02/27/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-02-27 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567

entry.summary: STIPULATION re 1 Complaint (To Extend Time to March 30, 2026 to Respond) by Jacquelyn Tremblett. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order)(Hall, Stephen) (Entered: 02/27/2026)

entry.title: Entry #7 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: SUMMONS Returned Executed Tesla, Inc. served on 2/5/2026, answer due 2/26/2026. (Nebenzahl, Andrew) (Entered: 02/17/2026)

entry.title: Entry #6 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: Civil Cover Sheet & Category Sheet by Jacquelyn Tremblett. (Nebenzahl, Andrew) (Entered: 02/05/2026)

entry.title: Entry #5 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: District Judge Angel Kelley: ORDER entered. Standing Order Regarding Motion Practice. (CEH) (Entered: 02/05/2026)

entry.title: Entry #4 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: Summons Issued as to Tesla, Inc.. Counsel receiving this notice electronically should download this summons, complete one for each defendant and serve it in accordance with Fed.R.Civ.P. 4 and LR 4.1. Summons will be mailed to plaintiff(s) not receiving notice electronically for completion of service. (CEH) (Entered: 02/05/2026)

entry.title: Entry #3 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC NOTICE of Case Assignment. District Judge Angel Kelley assigned to case. If the trial Judge issues an Order of Reference of any matter in this case to a Magistrate Judge, the matter will be transmitted to Magistrate Judge M. Page Kelley. (SP) (Entered: 02/05/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-02-05 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
Minute entry from 2026-02-05 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
Entry #2 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC NOTICE TO COUNSEL: Counsel shall complete and file in PDF format a Local Category Form. The form can be found on the court's website under Resources/Forms. Counsel will use the event under Other Documents- Civil Cover Sheet & Category Sheet. (MBM) (Entered: 02/05/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1 in Tremblett v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-10567
entry.summary: COMPLAINT against Tesla, Inc. Filing fee: $ 405, receipt number AMADC-11526130 (Fee Status: Filing Fee paid), filed by Jacquelyn Tremblett. (Attachments: # 1 Civil Cover Sheet)(Nebenzahl, Andrew) (Entered: 02/04/2026)
